item.name: Bronze Eel
item.description:
Despite having achieved a perfect shade of bronze, this slender and snakelike fish understands better than anyone that there is always room for improvement.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Legend has it that this smooth-scaled eel of dark bronze came into existence only after a lancer hurled a slain comrade's spear into the lake. The story fails to mention whether the lancer was ever aware of this miraculous genesis, or if it sparked a craze of submerging postmortem mementos in large bodies of water.
